title: Daggers, Dragons, and  Dumbasses
description: A Modpack focused on adding magic and an overall fantasy feel. This was on a Server with my friends a long time ago, so I hope you enjoy.
body:
This modpack was made by me and my friends a while ago, if you are reading this you are likely one of those friends. This modpack aims to add an element of fantasy to the game, with mods such as occultism, Tinker's Construct, Blood Magic, and most importantly, Ice & Fire. The pack is fairly light, being only around 29 mods, so it shouldnt be too difficult to run, though take that with a grain of salt; not all computers are created equal.

WARNING!
This is a kitchen sink modpack. All the mods were thrown together with little cohesion; not all mods will work with eachother perfectly.

Copyrights:
[Astral Sorcery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/astral-sorcery/files/3813365)
